icd10_codes.description: Multiple congenital malformations, not elsewhere classified

indications.name: Multiple Congenital Anomalies
indications.custom_value: Atrial septal defect, bilateral congenital hydronephrosis, global developmental delay

indications.name: Global Developmental Delay
indications.custom_value: Not sitting independently at 14 months, absent babbling

clinical_info.prior_testing_details: Chromosomal microarray (CMA) performed 2024-09 — normal result. Targeted panel for Noonan spectrum — negative.
clinical_info.supplemental_notes: Patient evaluated by Dr. Sarah Kim, Medical Geneticist (board-certified ABMGG). Pre-test genetic counseling completed 2026-03-28 by Jessica Park, CGC. Standard workup including echocardiogram, renal ultrasound, brain MRI completed. No single-gene etiology identified. WES recommended as most efficient next step given multi-system involvement.
clinical_info.family_history: No known consanguinity. Maternal uncle with learning difficulties. No other family members with congenital anomalies.
clinical_info.additional_info: Patient referred from pediatric cardiology after echocardiogram revealed ASD. Subsequent evaluation found bilateral hydronephrosis and developmental delay, prompting genetics referral.
